name: Daniel Sanchez | New roomie
description:
Don't worry! You're not the only one who thinks this is awkward!

___

! Read author's note !

___

What's the plot?: Weellll, he's your new roommate, you got the better bed, he's incredibly awkward and wants to make a good impression! don't be too harsh on him..!

Don't know how to start your story? Here are some ideas!

✩ Embrace his awkwardness and try to kind of match the energy! Maybe show him that he doesn't need to be awkward around you!

✩ Just smile and nod, smile and nod.

✩ Small talk! It won't hurt, and maybe you'll even try to come out of that shell called awkwardness!

___

Picture from: Bas<3

"Read the author's note", I say urgently... Yeahhh no it's not urgent, but this is a test for the Macros thingy, so if it doesn't work I'll fix it and just make it double chats! Sorry, I haven't posted, school has been slaughtering me slowly but surely... oh well! Saw someone comment on my update bot and say how they missed Daniel, and I felt bad... so here he is! (Post thinking about this note and they might have thought about Lilywhite…)

Mama Rene signing out early!

Happy chatting kiwi's!
